source_section.title_label_raw: Bicycle Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses

sections.title_label_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: Bicycle parking spaces are not required for any of the following uses:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: low-density dwelling use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: cluster housing use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: backyard suite use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: daycare use in any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: short-term bedroom rental use (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: home occupation use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: home office use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: small shared housing use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: work-live unit use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: car wash use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: self-storage facility use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: urban agriculture use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: cemetery use; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Parking Bicycle Parking Exemptions for Specific Uses
provisions.text: accessory structure or accessory use. Bicycle Parking Exemptions for a Change of Use

sections.title_label_raw: A change of use in a structure shall not:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in a structure shall not:
provisions.text: A change of use in a structure shall not:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in a structure shall not:
provisions.text: require bicycle parking beyond what is already provided on-site; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in a structure shall not:
provisions.text: reduce any existing bicycle parking that is provided on- site. General Bicycle Parking Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Direct access to all bicycle parking spaces shall be required

provisions.heading_context_raw: Direct access to all bicycle parking spaces shall be required
provisions.text: Direct access to all bicycle parking spaces shall be required from a streetline.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Direct access to all bicycle parking spaces shall be required
provisions.text: All bicycle parking spaces shall be required to be illuminated.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Direct access to all bicycle parking spaces shall be required
provisions.text: All bicycle parking racks shall require two points of contact between each bicycle and rack. Required Number of Bicycle Parking Spaces

sections.title_label_raw: Table 16 sets out the bicycle parking space requirements that

provisions.heading_context_raw: Table 16 sets out the bicycle parking space requirements that
provisions.text: Table 16 sets out the bicycle parking space requirements that shall apply for each use listed.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Table 16 sets out the bicycle parking space requirements that
provisions.text: If there is more than one use requiring bicycle parking, as listed in Table 16, then the amount of bicycle parking required on-site shall be the cumulative total of what is required for each use. Table 16: Required number of bicycle parking spaces Use General requirement Required percentage of Class A or Class B bicycle parking Minimum requirement for Class B bicycle parking Maximum requirement Multi-unit dwelling use 1 space for every 2 units 80% Class A 20% Class B 4 spaces Not Applicable Large shared housing use 1 space for every 20 bedrooms 80% Class A 20% Class B 2 spaces Not Applicable Hotel use 1 space for every 20 guestrooms 80% Class A 20% Class B 2 spaces Not Applicable Retail use; Local commercial use; Personal service use; Grocery store use; Restaurant use 1 space for every 300 sq. m of floor area 20% Class A 80% Class B 2 spaces Not Applicable Financial institution use; Office use; Hospital use; Medical clinic use; Religious institution use 1 space for every 500 sq. m of floor area 50% Class A 50% Class B 2 spaces Not Applicable Cultural use; Minor spectator venue use; Major spectator venue use 1 space for every 20 permanent seats or 1 space for every 250 sq. m of floor area, whichever is less 20% Class A 80% Class B 2 spaces 50 spaces School use; University or college use 1 space for every 150 sq. m of floor area 20% Class A 80% Class B 2 spaces Not Applicable Club recreation use; Community recreation use (indoor facilities) 10 spaces if less than 500 sq. m of floor area; 20 spaces for larger facilities 20% Class A 80% Class B Not Applicable Not Applicable Community recreation use (outdoor facilities) 1 space for every 1,250 sq. m lot area 100% Class B 2 spaces 50 spaces Parking structure use 1 space for every 20 motor vehicle parking spaces 100% Class B 2 spaces 50 spaces Any other use not specified in this Table or not exempted from bicycle parking requirements in Sections 446 and 447 1 space for every 500 sq. m of floor area 50% Class A 50% Class B 2 spaces Not Applicable Rounding Regulation

sections.title_label_raw: Where the calculation for bicycle parking results in a fraction of a

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where the calculation for bicycle parking results in a fraction of a
provisions.text: Where the calculation for bicycle parking results in a fraction of a bicycle parking space, the required number of bicycle parking spaces shall be rounded down to the nearest whole number. Class A Bicycle Parking Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: within a room that is dedicated to the storage of bicycles;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: within a roofed bicycle cage outside of a building;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: within an enclosed bicycle locker outside of a building;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: within a covered parking structure area reserved for bicycles; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: within a resident storage unit located in an indoor parking area that is associated with a multi-unit dwelling use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: Any bicycle room, roofed bicycle cage, enclosed bicycle locker, or covered parking structure area reserved for bicycles shall be secured against unauthorized entry.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be one or more of the following types:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: inverted-U that is a minimum of 0.90 metre in height;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: post-and-ring that is a minimum of 0.90 metre in height;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: vertical racks that are wall-mounted, not exceeding 50% of the total number of required Class A bicycle parking spaces; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: two-tier racks with a lift-assist.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: All bicycle parking racks and bicycle lockers shall be required to be secured to the ground, floor, or wall.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: All outdoor bicycle parking spaces shall be required to be surfaced with a hard material such as asphalt, concrete, or permeable pavers.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: All indoor Class A bicycle parking spaces shall be required to be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: located on a ground floor; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: located within one storey of a ground floor and be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: accessible from a ground floor with ramps, which are protected from motor vehicle traffic, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: accessible from a ground floor by elevator.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Required Class A bicycle parking racks shall be located:
provisions.text: The distance from any Class A bicycle parking space to the nearest building entrance shall not exceed 200 metres. Class B Bicycle Parking Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces shall be located outside of a building in a location that is visible and accessible from the street.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: Required Class B bicycle parking racks shall be a minimum height of 0.90 metre and be one or more of the following types:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: inverted-U; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: post-and-ring.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: All bicycle parking racks and bicycle lockers shall be required to be secured to the ground, floor, or wall.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: All outdoor bicycle parking spaces shall be required to be surfaced with a hard material such as asphalt, concrete, or permeable pavers.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: The required distance from any Class B bicycle parking space to the nearest visitor-accessible building entrance shall not exceed:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: 15.0 metres for unsheltered bicycle parking; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: 30.0 metres for sheltered bicycle parking.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: If the location of the main building prohibits the requirements of this Section from being satisfied, then:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: the owner may request an encroachment license from the Municipality to install the required Class B bicycle parking spaces in the adjacent public right-of-way. If the Municipality has granted an encroachment license allowing Class B bicycle parking spaces to be located in the street, then any Class B bicycle parking space provided in accordance with that license may be counted towards any required Class B bicycle parking; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 452(6), Class B bicycle parking spaces
provisions.text: the amount of Class B bicycle parking required can be located inside the main building within 30.0 metres of the nearest visitor-accessible building entrance. Minimum Bicycle Parking Geometric Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any main building entrance (Diagram 26).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: Bicycle parking racks shall be required to be spaced:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: in the direction of a bicycle's width (Diagram 26), (RCCC- Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: at least 0.45 metres apart for a vertical rack or two- tier rack with a lift assist, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: at least 0.9 metres apart for other types of rack; and (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: in the direction of a bicycle's length (Diagram 26), centered at least 1.8 metres apart. (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E- Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: A 1.5-metre wide clear aisle shall be provided between rows of any required bicycle parking racks (Diagram 26).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Bicycle parking racks are prohibited within 2.5 metres of any
provisions.text: Excluding wall-mounted racks and two-tier racks with a lift assist, a space of 0.6 metre shall be required to be provided between bicycle parking spaces and any obstruction, on all sides (Diagram 26). (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24) Diagram 26: Bicycle parking requirements, per Section 453
